message:
✨ Multi-tab tiled terminals with tmux mouse scroll (#34)

- Enable tmux mouse mode (set -g mouse on) for trackpad scrolling
- Add command event broadcast from server to all terminal WS clients
- Rewrite TerminalView with multi-tab support (add/close/switch tabs)
- Add checkbox selection + tile mode (CSS grid split view)
- Tab names auto-update to last command typed
- Green/red status dots per tab connection state

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
